name: vendor.myndhyve.entities
description: MyndHyve entities + validation + asset-decision + messaging primitives. 5 nodes covering project creation, cross-stage validation (deterministic, no LLM), workspace asset decision gates (brand / persona / KB), and chat send/reply via the messaging connector layer.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Project Create
nodes.description: Create a Project for a given Canvas Type. Generic primitive for multi-step orchestrations; idempotency-keyed via ctx.sideEffects when present.

nodes.label: Cross-Stage Validation
nodes.description: Deterministic field comparison across two workflow-stage artifacts. No LLM. Compare modes: equal | gte | lte | exists | count-match. Optional failOnMismatch.

nodes.label: Asset Decision Gate
nodes.description: HITL gate. Lists workspace assets of a given type (brand / persona / knowledgeBase), pauses for user choice (use-existing / create-new / skip). Auto-resolves if autoResolveVariable is already set.

nodes.label: Send Chat Message
nodes.description: Send a chat message to an explicitly targeted connector + conversation. Inputs override config defaults. Requires connectorInstanceId, channel, conversationId, and text (or media).

nodes.label: Chat Reply
nodes.description: Reply to the chat message that triggered this workflow run. Reads originating ingress envelope from run variables (`_ingressEnvelope`), builds outbound envelope, dispatches via messaging connector.
